title: Meeting Planner
scenario: Create a meeting planner for a remote team. The planner should include a schedule with start and end times, a list of attendees, and a dedicated space for notes. The planner should be generated in markdown format and should be no more than 10 lines long.
constraints: Must be no more than 10 lines long
Must include a schedule with start and end times
Must include a list of attendees

evaluationCriteria.description: The planner adheres to the constraints (length, schedule, attendees)
The markdown syntax is correct and follows standard guidelines
The content is accurate and includes relevant information
